note: Per-node enrichment for the horizontal history timeline. Keyed at runtime by normalized tl-evt title. domain = section slug for the Learn More link + image slot.

nodes.title: Fire Controlled
nodes.summary: Early humans mastered fire for cooking, warmth, protection and toolmaking — the first controlled energy source.

nodes.title: Hafted Stone Tools
nodes.summary: Stone blades bound to handles multiplied force and precision — the first engineered composite tools.

nodes.title: Symbolic Ochre Art
nodes.summary: Deliberate ochre engravings mark the earliest known abstract symbolic thought.

nodes.title: Cave Paintings
nodes.summary: Sophisticated pigment murals record early storytelling, observation and shared culture.

nodes.title: Agriculture Begins
nodes.summary: Domestication of crops and animals enabled settlement, surplus and the rise of civilisation.

nodes.title: The Wheel
nodes.summary: The wheel-and-axle transformed transport, pottery and machinery across the ancient world.

nodes.title: Writing — Cuneiform
nodes.summary: Wedge-marked clay tablets created the first durable system for recording language and trade.

nodes.title: Bronze Metallurgy
nodes.summary: Alloying copper with tin produced the first hard, castable metal for tools and structures.

nodes.title: Pyramids of Giza
nodes.summary: Monumental precision stonework demonstrating advanced surveying, logistics and construction engineering.

nodes.title: Iron Age Smelting
nodes.summary: High-temperature iron smelting yielded stronger, abundant metal that reshaped agriculture and building.

nodes.title: Antikythera Mechanism
nodes.summary: A geared bronze device that modelled astronomical cycles — the earliest known analog computer.

nodes.title: Archimedes — Lever, Screw, Pi
nodes.summary: Foundational work on levers, the screw pump and geometry that still underpins modern engineering.

nodes.title: Paper Invented
nodes.summary: Cai Lun's pulp-based paper made writing cheap and portable, accelerating the spread of knowledge.

nodes.title: Gunpowder
nodes.summary: The first practical energetic chemical mixture, later central to mining, propulsion and chemistry.

nodes.title: Moveable Type Printing
nodes.summary: Reusable character blocks enabled mass reproduction of text centuries before Europe.

nodes.title: Watt Steam Engine
nodes.summary: Efficient steam power mechanised industry and launched the Industrial Revolution.

nodes.title: Smallpox Vaccine
nodes.summary: Jenner's cowpox inoculation founded immunology and modern preventive medicine.

nodes.title: First Photograph
nodes.summary: Niépce fixed a permanent camera image, birthing photography and visual media.

nodes.title: Electric Telegraph
nodes.summary: Coded electrical signals delivered near-instant long-distance communication for the first time.

nodes.title: Telephone
nodes.summary: Bell transmitted the human voice over wire, connecting people across distance.

nodes.title: Incandescent Light Bulb
nodes.summary: A practical, long-lasting electric lamp brought reliable lighting to homes and industry.

nodes.title: Internal Combustion Car
nodes.summary: Benz's petrol-powered vehicle established personal motorised transport.

nodes.title: Radio Transmission
nodes.summary: Marconi sent information wirelessly through the air, launching broadcast communication.

nodes.title: X-Rays Discovered
nodes.summary: Röntgen's penetrating rays enabled non-invasive imaging of the body's interior.

nodes.title: Powered Flight
nodes.summary: The Wright brothers achieved sustained controlled flight, opening the age of aviation.

nodes.title: Special Relativity
nodes.summary: Einstein redefined space, time and energy, reshaping modern physics.

nodes.title: Penicillin Discovered
nodes.summary: Fleming's antibiotic mould launched the antibiotic era and saved countless lives.

nodes.title: Nuclear Fission Weapon
nodes.summary: Controlled nuclear fission was first demonstrated, later harnessed for large-scale power generation.

nodes.title: Transistor Invented
nodes.summary: The solid-state switch replaced vacuum tubes and became the building block of all electronics.

nodes.title: DNA Double Helix
nodes.summary: Watson and Crick revealed DNA's structure, founding molecular biology and genetics.

nodes.title: Sputnik — First Satellite
nodes.summary: The first artificial satellite opened the Space Age and orbital technology.

nodes.title: First Human in Space
nodes.summary: Gagarin's orbit proved humans could live and work beyond Earth.

nodes.title: Moon Landing
nodes.summary: Apollo 11 landed humans on the Moon, the peak achievement of the space race.

nodes.title: ARPANET — Internet Precursor
nodes.summary: The first packet-switched network linked computers, seeding the modern internet.

nodes.title: First Microprocessor — Intel 4004
nodes.summary: A complete processor on a single chip made affordable computing possible.

nodes.title: First Mobile Phone Call
nodes.summary: The first handheld cellular call began the era of personal mobile communication.

nodes.title: Apple Computer Founded
nodes.summary: Apple helped launch the personal computer industry and consumer computing.

nodes.title: TCP/IP — Modern Internet
nodes.summary: Standard networking protocols unified diverse networks into a single global internet.

nodes.title: World Wide Web
nodes.summary: Berners-Lee's hypertext system made the internet universally accessible via browsers.

nodes.title: Linux Kernel Released
nodes.summary: Torvalds' open-source kernel now powers servers, phones and cloud infrastructure worldwide.

nodes.title: Deep Blue Beats Kasparov
nodes.summary: IBM's chess computer defeated the world champion, a landmark for machine intelligence.

nodes.title: Google Founded
nodes.summary: Google's search algorithm organised the web and reshaped access to information.

nodes.title: Human Genome Sequenced
nodes.summary: The first full human DNA sequence launched genomics and personalised medicine.

nodes.title: iPhone Launched
nodes.summary: The multi-touch smartphone put internet-connected computing in everyone's pocket.

nodes.title: AlexNet — Deep Learning Breakthrough
nodes.summary: A deep neural network shattered image-recognition records, igniting the modern AI boom.

nodes.title: AlphaGo Beats Lee Sedol
nodes.summary: DeepMind's system mastered Go, showing AI could learn intuition-heavy tasks.

nodes.title: Attention Is All You Need — Transformers
nodes.summary: The transformer architecture became the foundation of modern large language models.

nodes.title: mRNA COVID Vaccines
nodes.summary: Rapidly developed mRNA vaccines proved a flexible new platform for medicine.

nodes.title: AlphaFold 2 — Protein Folding Solved
nodes.summary: AI predicted protein structures at scale, transforming biology and drug discovery.

nodes.title: ChatGPT — 100M users in 60 days
nodes.summary: Conversational AI reached the mainstream faster than any prior consumer technology.

nodes.title: First CRISPR Medicine — Casgevy
nodes.summary: The first approved CRISPR gene-editing therapy treated inherited blood disorders.

nodes.title: Humanoid Robots Enter Factories
nodes.summary: General-purpose humanoid robots began real production work alongside humans.

nodes.title: AI Runs Scientific Experiments Autonomously
nodes.summary: Autonomous AI systems now design, run and analyse experiments, accelerating discovery.
